top3.sql:
SELECT City
FROM (
    SELECT s.City, f.`Enrollment (K-12)`
    FROM schools s
    JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
    WHERE f.`Low Grade` <= 1 AND f.`High Grade` >= 12
    ORDER BY CAST(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` AS INTEGER) ASC
    LIMIT 5
)

SELECT City
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode IN (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM frpm
    WHERE `Enrollment (K-12)` IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY CAST(`Enrollment (K-12)` AS INTEGER)
    LIMIT 5
)

final.sql:
SELECT City
FROM (
    SELECT s.City, f.`Enrollment (K-12)`
    FROM schools s
    JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
    WHERE f.`Low Grade` <= 1 AND f.`High Grade` >= 12
    ORDER BY CAST(f.`Enrollment (K-12)` AS INTEGER) ASC
    LIMIT 5
)
